channel.title: composition on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in composition on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Software Composition Analysis (SCA): A Deep Dive
item.description: Software Composition Analysis (SCA) is a process for identifying and assessing security vulnerabilities in the open source components used to build software applications. SCA can be used to identify vulnerabilities in both third-party and in-house developed components. SCA is a critical tool for protecting software applications from security vulnerabilities. By identifying and addressing vulnerabilities in open source components, SCA can help to prevent attackers from exploiting these vulnerabilities to gain unauthorized access to applications and systems.
